packageRules.description: Gradle wrapper: one rolling PR per release train (e.g. 9.5.x patch lane and 9.6.x minor/RC lane). The top-level ignorePaths excludes the non-root gradle-wrapper.properties files (build-tools-internal/ and plugins/examples/) so Renovate's built-in gradle-wrapper manager only detects and updates the root gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties (fileMatch is additive and cannot be narrowed, hence ignorePaths). `respectLatest: false` together with `ignoreUnstable: false` lets the same PR keep rolling forward through Gradle RCs/milestones until we hit GA, mirroring our previous manual workflow.
